brand_identity.name: Solaris Films
brand_identity.tone: Exclusive, innovative, technologically advanced, authoritative (Tesla/Apple aesthetic)

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white

gradients.text_metallic: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-300 via-white to-slate-400

surfaces_and_materials.tracing_beam_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-slate-950 border border-white/5 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-colors duration-500

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12

motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items, subtle parallax for hero background
motion_and_interaction.glass_transition: When hovering over glass cards, increase backdrop-saturate and border opacity slightly.

components_strategy.hero: Full-screen fixed background with parallax. Overlay MUST be bg-black/40 (max). Bold asymmetric typography aligned left. CTA buttons stacked or side-by-side.
components_strategy.services_bento: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. Mix of spans (e.g., LCD Switch as the large 'Hero' col-span-8 row-span-2). Use glassmorphism and the tracing beam effect.
components_strategy.statistics: DO NOT USE A SEPARATE BLACK BAR. Integrate stats directly into a large typography section using 'Kinetic Texture' or large numbers overlapping subtle architectural glass images.
components_strategy.trust_indicators: Do not use placeholder image URLs. Instead, use pure typography and Lucide React icons (e.g., ShieldCheck for ISO 9001, Award for MADICO, Shield for 10-Year Warranty). Integrate these as sleek metallic badges.
components_strategy.purchase_process: Vertical step-by-step timeline with glowing active states and subtle connecting lines. Clean, minimalist layout.
components_strategy.quote_form: Shadcn Form, highly customized. Floating labels, bottom-border only inputs (or sleek glass boxes), dark theme.
components_strategy.chatbot: Floating glassmorphic orb in the bottom right corner with a subtle pulse animation.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60. 1px bottom border border-white/10.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY these exact URLs for images. Ensure all images have descriptive alt text. Apply a subtle gradient overlay to hero images to guarantee text contrast. DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDER SERVICES.

hero_background.description: Luxury modern mansion by a lake at night, perfect for hero section reflecting high-end aesthetics.

services_lcd_switch.description: AI-generated macro shot of hi-tech glass transitioning, perfect for LCD Switch product card.

services_photochromic.description: Abstract sleek architectural glass reflecting a sun glare, for the solar/photochromic films card.

services_privacy.description: Modern office interior with glass walls and reflections, ideal for privacy film service.

process_background.description: Contemporary office space with glass doors. Use with heavy dark overlay for the background of the step-by-step process.

blog_thumbnail_1.description: Spacious empty office with city views.

blog_thumbnail_2.description: Modern skyscraper reflecting the city, indicating architectural energy efficiency.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text overlaid on images has sufficient contrast by utilizing the specified overlays. Use minimum 4.5:1 ratio for body text.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500 for all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based.

iconography.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sophisticated, delicate tech feel. Do not use filled icons.
